---
title: "maydaystats"
subtitle: "Sports analytics, in public"
description: "A public sports analytics project covering baseball, hockey, and volleyball. Every post is backed by a real, automated data pipeline - pulling live data into published analysis, with the code and methodology shown alongside the writing."
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Data-driven writing on baseball, hockey, and volleyball — pipelines,
methodology, and analysis, all done in the open. See the [About](about.qmd)
page for what this project is and why it exists.
